task: Find boys' shoes priced under $20 with a 5-star average rating.
graderReasoning: The agent successfully found boys' shoes on JCPenney that meet the requested constraints and returned a supported list. Evidence shows the agent reached the filtered search results page at `https://www.jcpenney.com/s?searchTerm=boys+shoes&average_rating=5+rating`, where the page explicitly showed `43 results` and `average rating (1)`, indicating the 5-star filter was applied. From that filtered page, the snapshot displayed multiple products with prices under $20, including: stride rite Munchkin Lagoon Toddler Boys Round Closed Toe Slip-On Shoe ($16.99), Josmo Baby Boys Slip-On Shoe ($11.99), Hurley Little & Big Kid Boys Champ Strap Sandals ($19.99), Paw Patrol Toddler Boys Round Closed Toe Clogs ($19.99), Stepping Stone Infant Boys Double Strap Footbed Sandal ($15.99), Disney Collection Boys Marvel Spiderman Slide Sandals ($17.99), and Thereabouts Toddler Boys Lil Jack Flat Heel Chelsea Boots ($16.19). The agent’s final answer matches these visible products and prices, so the task was completed.

action_history: Opening JCPenney: const p0 = await openTab('https://www.jcpenney.com/');

Selecting the first under-$20 price range: await page.locator('e449').click();
Finding filter URL parameters: await page.locator('e50').click();
